---
title: "Explore My Research"
listing:
  contents: papers
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  categories: true
  sort: false
  fields: [title, description, categories]
page-layout: full
---

My research sits at the intersection of historical political economy, public choice, and the political economy of regulation. Use the topic and status filters to browse my working papers; click any card to read more.
